title: Counterfactual Detection and Reasoning
description: Detect counterfactual statements and annotate their antecedent and consequent spans, based on SemEval-2020 Task 5 (Yang et al.). Annotators identify whether a statement describes a hypothetical situation counter to known facts.

    booktitle = "Proceedings of the Fourteenth Workshop on Semantic Evaluation",
